title: Warehousing Development and Regulatory Authority and its repositories allowed to perform Aadhaar authentication on voluntary basis ( SO 698 (E) dated 14.02.2023)

(F) IR SHATEHT F WIEAH T ST A i I A wienmd aw s, FACETIHAT AT 977 HATAAT T ATATE AT, (@) TegE AR e Y I AT wewt 9 far wat am-a et w7 2. srETIeT faeTe wa AT grfernor, F qeh g e sfesE F 399 # oy wafer fRerfadert F1 arem Fom [W. . 15/2021-5=T20T-11] Tty T iy, s At 982 GI/2023 (0] -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(iij] * ECMINISTRY OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS, FOOD AND PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION (Department Of Food And Public Distribution) (WAREHOUSING DEVELOPMENT AND REGULATORY AUTHORITY) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th February, 2023 S.0. 698(E).—In pursuance of sub-clause (ii) of clause (b) of sub-section (4) of section 4 of the Aadhaar (Targeted Delivery of Financial And Other Subsidies, Benefits And Services) Act, 2016 (18 of 2016) read with rule 5 of the Aadhaar Authentication for Good Governance (Social Welfare, Innovation, Knowledge) Rules, 2020, the Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution, having been authorised by the Central Government, hereby notifies that the Warehousing Development Regulatory Authority and its regulated repositories are allowed to perform Aadhaar authentication, on voluntary basis, for the purposes given below, with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, namely:- (a) Onboardingof depositors, warchouseman and others on WDRA portal and its regulated repositories plélfbrm'i‘l/ifdugh aadhar e-KYC; 36 T i . . . i (b) performiné Sgl'VlCE: transactions on WDRA portal and its regulated repositories. 1112: The Warehousing Development Regulatory Authority shall adhere to the guidelines with respect to use of Aadhaar authentication as laid down by the Central Government. [F-No. 15/2021-Stg-IT] SUBODH KUMAR SINGH, Addl. Secy.
